metadata.description: NarAI Labs plugins for Claude Code — AI-powered development tools

plugins.name: browser-qa
plugins.description: AI-powered QA agent that browses your web app, discovers screens and interactive elements, tests CRUD lifecycles, verifies actions, runs permutations, and auto-fixes bugs — targeting 90%+ coverage

plugins.name: agentic-tdd
plugins.description: Enforced Test-Driven Development with Claude Code agent teams. Fullstack unit pipeline (backend+frontend in one unit), TypeScript verification scripts enforce anti-cheat via Bash with tsc compilation checks built-in. Script output visible in conversation — cannot be fabricated.

plugins.name: feedback-loop-builder
plugins.description: Retrofit self-improving feedback loops into existing skills or agents. Makes any skill/agent learn from usage and mistakes, improving itself every run — without ever changing its scope.
